prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TROWELKNEELINGPADCOMBO Product Type: SHOVEL_SPADE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: 2-Pack Set of Ultra Light Foam Kneeling Pad and Garden Hand Trowel Shovel Outdoor Home Combo Description: This garden trowel is perfect for keeping your garden tidy. Comes with two foam kneeling pads for comfortable gardening.

The hand trowel is made with tough plastic which makes it durable and lightweight. Each trowel features a 4 inch measuring scale on the scoop so you can control the depth of your digging.

The foam pads feature soft cushioning for kneeling or sitting on hard surfaces with handles for easy transport and storage. Large foam kneeling pad is great for gardening, cleaning, outdoor activities and more.

Made with soft and durable EVA material these pads are lightweight and convenient for carrying and storage.

Perfect for protecting your knees and can even be used as a seat cushion especially for bleachers and sporting events.Comes in Blue and Green (color ships at random) Search Terms: knee pad foam cushion outdoor activities gardening gardening tools landscaping yard work harvesting Features: - Foam Kneeling Pad Dimensions: 16" x 8" x 0.75 inches; Hand Trowel Dimensions: 11 inch x 3 inches - Comes with two soft kneeling pads; soft lightweight and durable EVA material - Rubberized thumb grip on handle with hang up hole - Used to Protect Your Knees and Can Also be Used as a Seat Cushion - Great for Gardening, Cleaning, Outdoor Activities, etc. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 2-Pack Foam Kneeling Pad and Garden Trowel
